title: gilia cana subsp. triceps
intro: Gilia cana subsp. triceps, also known as Globe Gilia, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Globe Gilia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and ease pain. Globe Gilia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
